content: que chico tan guapo ha hecho esta web o.o
Test XSS Payload!
Shipped the new onboarding flow today. The retention bump looks promising.
API pagination is one of those things that seems simple until you need it to be correct.
Session handling is much easier to reason about when the server owns token issuance.
Dark mode? Yes. Also making the dashboard responsive for smaller screens.
Working on a feed endpoint that returns stable pages even while new posts arrive.
Test apps should still feel like real products. Tiny details help a lot.
Today I switched the home screen to use server-rendered session data on first load.
A small demo can still exercise auth, sessions, pagination, and state restoration.
Login/register endpoints are cleaner when they both return the same session payload shape.
